name: SOBR Safe, Inc.
summary: SOBR Safe, Inc. provides non-invasive alcohol monitoring and detection technologies. Its SOBRsafe software platform integrates with patent-pending hardware devices SOBRcheck and SOBRsure to deliver alcohol detection and identity verification. The company serves behavioral health, judicial, commercial, and consumer markets. It operates as a single segment, selling through channel partners, sales agents, and digital marketing channels from its headquarters in Greenwood Village, Colorado.

products.name: SOBRsafe
products.description: Scalable patent-pending software platform integrating non-invasive alcohol monitoring and producing statistical business and user data.

products.name: SOBRcheck
products.description: Patent-pending integrated hardware device for non-invasive alcohol detection and identity verification.

products.name: SOBRsure
products.description: Patent-pending integrated hardware device for non-invasive alcohol detection and identity verification.
